concrete_goal: Create a browser-based to-do list for students to capture assignments, mark tasks complete, filter by due date, and review empty, validation, saved, and overdue states from the first screen.
success_criteria: Users can add, edit, complete, delete, and filter task records.
The task list shows due dates, priority, completion state, and empty or validation guidance.
Desktop and mobile layouts keep task rows, filters, and action controls readable without overlap.
scope_in: Single-page to-do list UI with local client-side task state.
Task list, checklist, and due-date interactions with seeded sample assignments.
Responsive controls, labels, keyboard focus, validation messages, and empty or saved states.
scope_out: Authentication, external calendars, notifications, paid APIs, backend persistence, and production deployment.
assumptions: Local browser state is enough for the prototype.
Sample tasks are fictional and do not require user accounts.
implementation_constraints: Do not add external services or paid APIs.
Keep the primary task workflow available on the first screen.

scenario_flows.name: Add and complete a task
preconditions: The to-do list is open with seeded sample tasks.
steps: Create a task with title, due date, and priority.
Save the task and mark it complete.
Filter the list to show remaining active tasks.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The saved task appears in the list, completion changes task counts, and filters update without hiding overdue items.
failure_or_edge_cases: Missing task title shows validation and disables save.
Empty filter results show a reset option.

verification_matrix.build: Run the available build command for the task list app.
verification_matrix.test: Run available tests or add a focused task-list behavior test if the project has a test harness.
verification_matrix.run: Open the local to-do list app and report the URL or file path.
verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check add, edit, complete, delete, filter, validation, empty state, desktop layout, mobile layout, and keyboard focus behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Desktop 1440x900 screenshot or visual inspection artifact showing the to-do list, filters, task form, and complete/delete controls with no overlap.
Mobile 390x844 screenshot or visual inspection artifact showing stacked task controls and wrapped long task text.
Behavior evidence for creating a task, marking it complete, deleting a task, filtering active tasks, and observing count updates.
Accessibility evidence covering labels, visible focus, keyboard operation, and contrast-sensitive priority indicators.
State coverage evidence for empty, validation, disabled, saved-success, and overdue states.
iteration_policy: Rework until the review score reaches the quality threshold.

delegation_plan_seed.objective: Build the to-do task list app.
